VALORANT Patch Notes 8.05

By VALORANT Team

March 12, 2026

Agent Updates

Clove receives a small adjustment to their decay timer.

Iso's wall now blocks bullets for an additional 0.25 seconds.

Map Updates

Sunset's mid-cubby has been re-textured to improve visibility.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed a rare crash when entering Practice Range during act rollover.
  • Fixed an issue where Reyna's Empress voice line could overlap match start music.

NAV-CHROME-SIDEBAR-RECOMMENDED-ARTICLES
